2605.13687.title: A Hierarchical Language Model with Predictable Scaling Laws and Provable Benefits of Reasoning
2605.13687.paper_summary: We introduce a family of synthetic languages with hierarchical structure -- generated by a broadcast process on trees -- for which the role of context length and reasoning in autoregressive generation can be analyzed precisely. At the heart of our analytic approach is an \emph{exact $k$-gram ansatz} in place of transformers with context length $k$, a substitution we then validate empirically. Using this ansatz we derive explicit asymptotic predictions for distributional statistics of the sequences produced by a trained model, instantiated in two settings. For the \emph{Ising broadcast process} (a soft-constrained language), we prove that the variance of the generated sum scales log-linearly in the context depth and its kurtosis converges to that of a Gaussian -- both deviating from the true language for any sublinear context. For the \emph{coloring broadcast process} (a hard-constrained language) in the freezing regime, bounded-context autoregression produces sequences that, with high probability, are inconsistent with \emph{any} valid coloring of the underlying tree. Together these results imply an $Ω(n)$ lower bound on the context length required to faithfully sample length-$n$ sequences. In contrast, we prove that an autoregressive \emph{reasoning} model with only $Θ(\log n)$ working memory can sample exactly from the true language -- an exponential improvement. We confirm both the lower-bound predictions and the reasoning-based upper bound empirically with transformers trained on the synthetic language; the trained models track our asymptotic predictions quantitatively across a wide range of context sizes.
2605.13687.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹一系列具有階層結構的合成語言——由樹上的廣播過程生成——在這些語言中，背景長度和推理在自回歸生成中的作用可以被精確分析。<lb/>我們分析方法的核心是一個\emph{精確的 $k$-gram ansatz}，取代了上下文長度為 $k$ 的Transformer，這一替代我們隨後進行了實證驗證。<lb/>利用這個 ansatz，我們推導出受訓模型生成的序列的分佈統計的明確漸近預測，並在兩種設置中具體化。<lb/>對於\emph{伊辛廣播過程}（一種軟約束語言），我們證明生成的和的方差在上下文深度上以對數線性縮放，其峰度收斂於高斯的峰度——在任何次線性上下文下，這兩者都偏離了真實語言。<lb/>對於在冷凍範圍內的\emph{著色廣播過程}（一種硬約束語言），有界上下文自回歸生成的序列在高概率下與基礎樹的\emph{任何}有效著色不一致。<lb/>這些結果共同暗示了對於忠實抽樣長度為 $n$ 的序列所需的上下文長度的 $Ω(n)$ 下界。<lb/>相對而言，我們證明了一個僅需 $Θ(\log n)$ 工作記憶的自回歸\emph{推理}模型可以精確地從真實語言中抽樣——這是一個指數級的改善。<lb/>我們通過在合成語言上訓練的Transformer實證確認了下界預測和基於推理的上界；訓練模型在廣泛的上下文大小範圍內定量追蹤了我們的漸近預測。
2605.13687.author: Jason Gaitonde et.al.
2605.13687.authors: Jason Gaitonde, Frederic Koehler, Elchanan Mossel, Joonhyung Shin, Allan Sly
